title: Quick Fix Malaysian Tomato Crumble
description: A quick and easy umami-rich dish featuring English mustard for a tangy kick, perfect as a low-fat-friendly side or main course.
instructions: Mix together the tomato paste, English mustard sauce, plain low-fat yogurt, fresh basil leaves, and a pinch of salt and pepper in a bowl. Stir well until smooth and well combined.
In another bowl, whisk together the all-purpose flour with a few drops of butter or oil to create a crumb mixture. The mixture should be thick but spreadable.
Place half of the tomato sauce mixture onto a baking dish, then top it evenly with the crumble mixture. Repeat layers until all ingredients are used.
Sprinkle the remaining tablespoon of flour over the top layer and gently press into place for an extra crunch.
Broil in the preheated oven for about 5 minutes or until golden brown on top. Watch closely to avoid burning.
Remove from oven once golden, let it cool slightly before serving as a side dish with rice or as the main course.
